42 And it came to pass on the morrow, that the people went out into the field; and they told Abimelech.

Book of Mormon Word Usage: To Cross Oneself Occasionally the Book of Mormon uses an un usual expression for English that calls for greater attention. One example is found in Alma 39:9, where Alma exhorts his son Corianton to “repent and forsake your sins, and go no more after the lusts of your eyes, but cross yourself in all these things; for except ye do this ye can in nowise inherit the kingdom…
